final_report.title: Mingli five-agent report for 林凡
summary: BaZi structure is element-skewed with Fire emphasis.
Zi Wei Ming palace sits at Fortune with Taiyang emphasis.
Qi Men pattern suggests stable planning through Rest door.
Western chart highlights Sun Aries and Ascendant Virgo.

bazi.reason: bazi supports final synthesis if it preserves: Symbolic BaZi reading; not deterministic prediction.

ziwei.reason: ziwei supports final synthesis if it preserves: Symbolic Zi Wei reading; chart precision depends on calendar conversion.

qimen.reason: qimen supports final synthesis if it preserves: Symbolic Qi Men reading; not a tactical guarantee.

astrology.reason: astrology supports final synthesis if it preserves: Symbolic astrology reading; not evidence-based prediction.

_claims.claim: Final synthesis may combine the four macro readings only with explicit uncertainty.
Yearly timing claims require BaZi annual rows and cross-system timing checks.

challenges.reason: Symbolic Zi Wei reading; chart precision depends on calendar conversion.

_claims.claim: Relationship and family language must stay symbolic and avoid deterministic decisions.

challenges.reason: Symbolic Qi Men reading; not a tactical guarantee.

_claims.claim: Career and finance themes may be surfaced as reflective prompts, not advice.

challenges.reason: Symbolic astrology reading; not evidence-based prediction.

bazi_sanming.note: Sanming-oriented readings organize pillar relationships, pattern language, and luck-cycle symbolism as staged interpretive context.
bazi_sanming.caution: Do not convert symbolic pattern labels into certain predictions.
bazi_sanming.title: Sanming pattern and life-stage framing

bazi_shensha.note: Shensha tables are best treated as auxiliary symbolic markers that can enrich, but should not override, core pillar and element analysis.
bazi_shensha.caution: Do not over-weight auxiliary star labels.
bazi_shensha.title: Shensha auxiliary marker usage

bazi_ziping.note: Ziping-style analysis treats the four pillars as a structured symbolic system, then weighs element balance, seasonal strength, pattern, and useful-element selection.
bazi_ziping.title: Ziping balance and useful-element method

qimen_door_star_spirit.note: Door, star, and spirit combinations are read jointly, so a single auspicious or inauspicious label should not be isolated from the plate context.
qimen_door_star_spirit.caution: Avoid deterministic auspicious or inauspicious claims.
qimen_door_star_spirit.title: Qi Men door-star-spirit combinations

qimen_plate.note: Qi Men analysis reads heaven, earth, human, and spirit layers together to relate symbolic timing, direction, role, and circumstance.
qimen_plate.caution: Timing symbolism is not tactical certainty.
qimen_plate.title: Qi Men layered plate method

western_natal.note: Western natal chart interpretation commonly combines planets, signs, houses, and angles as symbolic descriptors of temperament and life topics.
western_natal.caution: Use as cultural symbolism, not scientific diagnosis.
western_natal.title: Western natal symbolism

western_transit.note: Transit interpretation frames annual and monthly themes through moving-planet symbolism and house activation.
western_transit.title: Western transit cycle framing

ziwei_four_transformations.note: The four transformations provide symbolic movement labels for gain, authority, reputation or study, and friction or constraint.
ziwei_four_transformations.caution: Treat transformations as tendencies, not guaranteed events.
ziwei_four_transformations.title: Zi Wei four transformations

ziwei_palace.note: Zi Wei Dou Shu organizes interpretation through the Ming palace, body palace, and twelve-palace relationships for life-domain symbolism.
ziwei_palace.caution: Birth-hour and calendar conversion affect palace placement.
ziwei_palace.title: Zi Wei twelve-palace frame

evidence_summary.caution: Do not convert symbolic pattern labels into certain predictions.

action_plan.certification_command_template: python -m examples.mingli_5agents.cli --repo <repo> certify-provider ziwei --command "<provider-command>" --provenance "provider=<provider-name>; version=<provider-version>; source=<review-source>; license_or_review=<license-or-review>" --record
deployment_checklist: Implement a JSON-CLI provider that reads the ziwei stdin schema and returns the stdout schema.
Verify normalized output covers the ziwei required_method_surface before certification.
Set SEMAS_ZIWEI_CLI to the reviewed provider command.
Set SEMAS_ZIWEI_PROVIDER_PROVENANCE with provider, version, source, and license_or_review.
Run providers --profile production --live and fix stdout-contract failures.
Run certify-provider ziwei --record to write a provider certification ledger receipt.
Run provider-drift --domain ziwei after deployment and before release.

## 出生资料核对

bazi_sanming.note: Sanming-oriented readings organize pillar relationships, pattern language, and luck-cycle symbolism as staged interpretive context.
bazi_sanming.caution: Do not convert symbolic pattern labels into certain predictions.
bazi_sanming.title: Sanming pattern and life-stage framing

bazi_shensha.note: Shensha tables are best treated as auxiliary symbolic markers that can enrich, but should not override, core pillar and element analysis.
bazi_shensha.caution: Do not over-weight auxiliary star labels.
bazi_shensha.title: Shensha auxiliary marker usage

bazi_ziping.note: Ziping-style analysis treats the four pillars as a structured symbolic system, then weighs element balance, seasonal strength, pattern, and useful-element selection.
bazi_ziping.title: Ziping balance and useful-element method

qimen_door_star_spirit.note: Door, star, and spirit combinations are read jointly, so a single auspicious or inauspicious label should not be isolated from the plate context.
qimen_door_star_spirit.caution: Avoid deterministic auspicious or inauspicious claims.
qimen_door_star_spirit.title: Qi Men door-star-spirit combinations

qimen_plate.note: Qi Men analysis reads heaven, earth, human, and spirit layers together to relate symbolic timing, direction, role, and circumstance.
qimen_plate.caution: Timing symbolism is not tactical certainty.
qimen_plate.title: Qi Men layered plate method

western_natal.note: Western natal chart interpretation commonly combines planets, signs, houses, and angles as symbolic descriptors of temperament and life topics.
western_natal.caution: Use as cultural symbolism, not scientific diagnosis.
western_natal.title: Western natal symbolism

western_transit.note: Transit interpretation frames annual and monthly themes through moving-planet symbolism and house activation.
western_transit.title: Western transit cycle framing

ziwei_four_transformations.note: The four transformations provide symbolic movement labels for gain, authority, reputation or study, and friction or constraint.
ziwei_four_transformations.caution: Treat transformations as tendencies, not guaranteed events.
ziwei_four_transformations.title: Zi Wei four transformations

ziwei_palace.note: Zi Wei Dou Shu organizes interpretation through the Ming palace, body palace, and twelve-palace relationships for life-domain symbolism.
ziwei_palace.caution: Birth-hour and calendar conversion affect palace placement.
ziwei_palace.title: Zi Wei twelve-palace frame
